'''âzh-v-t''' ('''kazhavat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wedge|wedge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-v-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wedge|wedge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-v-t
|-
! Lemma
| kazhavat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhavat|thizhavat]] || [[word:jizhavat|jizhavat]] || [[word:shizhavat|shizhavat]] || [[word:kizhavat|kizhavat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhavat|thuthuzhavat]] || [[word:jujuzhavat|jujuzhavat]] || [[word:shushuzhavat|shushuzhavat]] || [[word:kukuzhavat|kukuzhavat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhavat|thuzhavat]] || [[word:juzhavat|juzhavat]] || [[word:shuzhavat|shuzhavat]] || [[word:kuzhavat|kuzhavat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhavat|thuzhavat]] || [[word:juzhavat|juzhavat]] || [[word:shuzhavat|shuzhavat]] || [[word:kuzhavat|kuzhavat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhavat|thezhavat]] || [[word:jezhavat|jezhavat]] || [[word:shezhavat|shezhavat]] || [[word:kezhavat|kezhavat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhavat|thothozhavat]] || [[word:jojozhavat|jojozhavat]] || [[word:shoshozhavat|shoshozhavat]] || [[word:kokozhavat|kokozhavat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhavat|thozhavat]] || [[word:jozhavat|jozhavat]] || [[word:shozhavat|shozhavat]] || [[word:kozhavat|kozhavat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhavat|thozhavat]] || [[word:jozhavat|jozhavat]] || [[word:shozhavat|shozhavat]] || [[word:kozhavat|kozhavat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhavat|thĂŠzhavat]] || [[word:jĂŠzhavat|jĂŠzhavat]] || [[word:shĂŠzhavat|shĂŠzhavat]] || [[word:kĂŠzhavat|kĂŠzhavat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhavat|thathazhavat]] || [[word:jajazhavat|jajazhavat]] || [[word:shashazhavat|shashazhavat]] || [[word:kakazhavat|kakazhavat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhavat|thazhavat]] || [[word:jazhavat|jazhavat]] || [[word:shazhavat|shazhavat]] || [[word:kazhavat|kazhavat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhavat|thazhavat]] || [[word:jazhavat|jazhavat]] || [[word:shazhavat|shazhavat]] || [[word:kazhavat|kazhavat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhavat|shazhavat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhavat|goshazhavat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhavat|gokishazhavat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhavatnĂŒ|shazhavatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhavatnknĂŒ|goshazhavatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhavatnĂŒ|gokishazhavatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhavatshĂ«|shazhavatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhavatnkshĂ«|goshazhavatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhavatshĂ«|gokishazhavatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhavatro|shazhavatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhavatnkro|goshazhavatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhavatro|gokishazhavatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhavatmu|shazhavatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhavatnkmu|goshazhavatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhavatmu|gokishazhavatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhavatsher|shazhavatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhavatnksher|goshazhavatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhavatsher|gokishazhavatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhavatng|shazhavatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhavatnkng|goshazhavatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhavatng|gokishazhavatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhavatya|shazhavatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhavatnkya|goshazhavatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhavatya|gokishazhavatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhavatyam|shazhavatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhavatnkyam|goshazhavatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhavatyam|gokishazhavatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhavatnĂŒshĂ«|shazhavatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhavatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhavatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhavatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhavatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhavatnĂŒro|shazhavatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhavatnknĂŒro|goshazhavatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhavatnĂŒro|gokishazhavatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhavatnĂŒmu|shazhavatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhavatnknĂŒmu|goshazhavatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhavatnĂŒmu|gokishazhavatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhavatshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhavatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhavatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhavatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhavatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhavatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhavatshĂ«ro|shazhavatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhavatnkshĂ«ro|goshazhavatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhavatshĂ«ro|gokishazhavatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhavatshĂ«mu|shazhavatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhavatnkshĂ«mu|goshazhavatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhavatshĂ«mu|gokishazhavatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhavatronĂŒ|shazhavatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhavatnkronĂŒ|goshazhavatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhavatronĂŒ|gokishazhavatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhavatroshĂ«|shazhavatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhavatnkroshĂ«|goshazhavatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhavatroshĂ«|gokishazhavatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhavatromu|shazhavatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhavatnkromu|goshazhavatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhavatromu|gokishazhavatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhavatmunĂŒ|shazhavatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhavatnkmunĂŒ|goshazhavatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhavatmunĂŒ|gokishazhavatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhavatmushĂ«|shazhavatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhavatnkmushĂ«|goshazhavatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhavatmushĂ«|gokishazhavatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhavatmuro|shazhavatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhavatnkmuro|goshazhavatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhavatmuro|gokishazhavatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
